Song {
    metadata: Metadata {
        title: Some(
            "Override Title",
        ),
        subtitles: [],
        artists: [],
        composers: [],
        lyricists: [],
        album: None,
        year: None,
        key: Some(
            "E",
        ),
        tempo: Some(
            "120",
        ),
        time: None,
        capo: Some(
            "3",
        ),
        sort_title: None,
        sort_artist: None,
        arrangers: [],
        copyright: None,
        duration: None,
        tags: [],
        custom: [],
    },
    lines: [
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "title",
                value: Some(
                    "Selector Test",
                ),
                kind: Title,
                selector: None,
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "comment",
                value: Some(
                    "Play softly",
                ),
                kind: Comment,
                selector: Some(
                    "piano",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "comment_italic",
                value: Some(
                    "Strum gently",
                ),
                kind: CommentItalic,
                selector: Some(
                    "guitar",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "key",
                value: Some(
                    "E",
                ),
                kind: Key,
                selector: Some(
                    "bass",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "capo",
                value: Some(
                    "3",
                ),
                kind: Capo,
                selector: Some(
                    "ukulele",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "start_of_chorus",
                value: None,
                kind: StartOfChorus,
                selector: Some(
                    "piano",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Lyrics(
            LyricsLine {
                segments: [
                    LyricsSegment {
                        chord: Some(
                            Chord {
                                name: "C",
                                detail: Some(
                                    ChordDetail {
                                        root: C,
                                        root_accidental: None,
                                        quality: Major,
                                        extension: None,
                                        bass_note: None,
                                    },
                                ),
                            },
                        ),
                        text: "La la la",
                        spans: [],
                    },
                ],
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "end_of_chorus",
                value: None,
                kind: EndOfChorus,
                selector: Some(
                    "piano",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "title",
                value: Some(
                    "Override Title",
                ),
                kind: Title,
                selector: Some(
                    "band",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "tempo",
                value: Some(
                    "120",
                ),
                kind: Tempo,
                selector: Some(
                    "drums",
                ),
            },
        ),
    ],
}
